files_created: one new test file or addition to existing graph-builder test
downstream_consumers: output-validator.ts (will use this in successor WO)
graph.json consumers that read file-grain node metadata

risks.title: File with no extracted elements has no headerStatus to stamp
risks.mitigation: seenFiles includes files from importResolutions (no elements). headerStatus is optional — simply omit if no element found for that file. Same pattern as element-grain nodes where headerStatus is undefined.

risks.title: Multiple elements per file with different headerStatus values
risks.mitigation: First-seen-wins per file — same policy as buildFileHeaderStatusMap in output-validator.ts (every element from a given file shares the same headerStatus, so deterministic).

candidates.change: Before pushing file-grain node, look up headerStatus from first element matching file. If found, add to metadata.

decision_records.decision: First-seen-wins per file for headerStatus on file-grain node
decision_records.rationale: Matches existing buildFileHeaderStatusMap policy in output-validator.ts. Every element from a file shares the same headerStatus (stamped by orchestrator.ts Phase 5), so first-match is deterministic.

decision_records.decision: headerStatus omitted (not null) when file has no elements
decision_records.rationale: Consistent with element-grain node pattern where headerStatus is optional (L252 in graph-builder). Avoids polluting file-grain nodes for import-only files.
